pages.text: Firearms secondary. Crafts the Pistol (flintlock, iron-block breech), Musket (long iron-block barrel), Blunderbuss (flared bore), Cartridge ammunition (paper-wrapped powder and iron-nugget shot; yields 4), and the Musket Upgrade Smithing Template (used at a smithing table to upgrade a musket into the Bayonet or Scope variant).
